title: Log Invoice to Tracker
summary: Extract invoice data from an email, update the tracker, and confirm receipt.
entry_conditions: An invoice email arrives for review.

vendor_name.description: The vendor name extracted from the invoice email.

invoice_amount.description: The invoice amount extracted from the invoice email.

approval_threshold.description: Finance approval threshold used to decide whether explicit approval is required.

sender_email.description: The sender of the invoice email.

tracker_row.description: The row in the tracker that was updated.

confirmation_sent.description: Whether the confirmation reply was sent.

nodes.name: Read invoice email
nodes.instruction: Open the invoice email and identify the vendor name, invoice amount, and sender email.
completion_checks: The vendor name, amount, and sender email have been identified.

recovery.instructions: Pause and ask the user if any required invoice detail is missing, ambiguous, or unreadable.

nodes.name: Open tracker
nodes.instruction: Open the invoice tracker workbook in Excel.
completion_checks: The tracker workbook is open and visible.

recovery.instructions: Retry opening the workbook once and stop for review if the tracker file still cannot be opened.

nodes.name: Update tracker row
nodes.instruction: Find the next empty row and enter the vendor name and invoice amount.
completion_checks: The vendor name and amount appear in the selected row.

recovery.instructions: If a valid row cannot be located confidently, pause and ask the user which row to use.

risk.reason: Spreadsheet edits are reversible before save.

nodes.name: Amount above approval threshold?
nodes.question: Is the invoice amount above the approval threshold?
nodes.evaluation_hint: Compare the extracted invoice amount with the declared approval_threshold value.

nodes.name: Get finance approval
nodes.reason: High-value invoices require explicit approval before sending confirmation.

nodes.name: Draft confirmation reply
nodes.instruction: Prepare a reply confirming that the invoice was updated in the tracker.
completion_checks: A confirmation reply draft is ready.

recovery.instructions: Ask the user for direction if a clear confirmation draft cannot be prepared from the available invoice details.

nodes.name: Confirm external reply
nodes.reason: This action sends an email to an external party.

nodes.name: Send reply
completion_checks: The confirmation email has been sent.

recovery.instructions: Do not send the email if the recipient, approval state, or final draft cannot be verified confidently.

risk.reason: Sending the email affects an external party.

provenance.observed_vs_inferred_summary: Core actions were observed from the recording. Approval and threshold routing were inferred from risk and workflow structure.
